sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ARRAY Technologies Upsizes and Extends Revolving Credit Facility to $370 Million, Strengthening Liquidity and Strategic Flexibility
feed.summary: ARRAY Technologies (NASDAQ: ARRY) has successfully upsized and extended its revolving credit facility from $166 million to $370 million, pushing its maturity to February 18, 2031. This move significantly enhances the company's liquidity, supports operational execution, and provides flexibility for global growth initiatives. The expanded facility, which includes several major banking partners, reflects strong confidence in ARRAY's strategy and its position as a global leader in utility-scale solar technology.

feed.title: (WABF) as a Liquidity Pulse for Institutional Tactics
feed.summary: This article provides an AI-driven analysis of Western Asset Bond Etf (NASDAQ: WABF), highlighting a neutral sentiment across all time horizons. It outlines three institutional trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—with specific entry, target, and stop-loss levels. The analysis emphasizes current signals, support, and resistance levels derived from multi-timeframe signal analysis.

feed.title: Roper Technologies Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.91 a Share, Payable April 22 to Holders of Record April 6
feed.summary: Roper Technologies has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.91 per share. The dividend is scheduled for payment on April 22 to shareholders of record as of April 6. This decision reflects the company's continued commitment to returning value to its investors.

feed.title: Wall of Trump Questions Swamps Morgan Stanley Muni Webinar
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's annual "State of the States" webinar saw a significant increase in attendance as financial advisers sought answers on how President Trump's agenda would impact municipal budgets and bonds. Many questions focused on blue states like California, New York, Illinois, and New Jersey, which have faced federal funding freezes and threats. While concerns are high due to federal funding uncertainties, Morgan Stanley notes that anxiety hasn't yet translated into broad muni-market moves, with demand for bonds in states like California remaining strong.

feed.title: TFI International Inc. (NYSE:TFII) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: TFI International (NYSE:TFII) reported robust Q4 2025 results, driven by strong free cash flow and strategic capital allocation, including a dividend increase and share repurchases. Despite a challenging freight environment, the company generated over $10 per share in free cash flow for 2025. Looking ahead to Q1 2026, TFI projects adjusted diluted EPS to be between $0.50 and $0.60, with ongoing efforts to improve service, optimize operations, and pursue strategic tuck-in acquisitions while cautiously navigating market uncertainties.

feed.title: BofA Commits $25 Billion of Its Own Cash to Private Credit Deals
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) is allocating $25 billion of its own capital to private credit deals, expanding its direct-lending efforts. This move follows other Wall Street rivals investing in the growing private credit market. The deals will be originated through the bank's capital-markets division, part of its investment-banking business.

feed.title: Invitation Homes Q4 2025 Earnings Call Insights
feed.summary: Invitation Homes reported a Q4 2025 core FFO of $0.48 per share, a 1.3% year-over-year increase, contributing to a full-year core FFO of $1.91 per share. The company acquired ResiBuilt Homes to boost in-house development and is projecting cautious same-store NOI growth between 0.3% and 2% for 2026 amidst supply pressures and rising expenses. Analysts have issued recent downgrades due to potential regulatory risks and a revised market outlook for REITs in 2026.

feed.title: Chubb names new chief actuary
feed.summary: Chubb has announced the appointment of Scott Henck as senior vice president at Chubb Group and chief actuary, effective April 1, succeeding the retiring Paul O’Connell. Mr. Henck will oversee actuarial operations including reserving, pricing, and capital performance measurement. Cynthia Bentley will be promoted to Mr. Henck's current role as executive vice president and chief actuary, North America.

feed.title: SHERWIN WILLIAMS CO SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams Co. has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing financial performance, business operations, and strategic plans. The report highlights increased net sales and gross profit but notes a decrease in net income and diluted net income per share due to higher expenses and currency impacts. The company plans future store expansions, strategic acquisitions, and aims to mitigate economic and operational challenges.

feed.title: Key facts: Altria Group shifts to smoke-free products; strong Marlboro sales
feed.summary: Altria Group is focusing on transitioning to smoke-free products, having observed significant growth in its oral tobacco and nicotine pouch segments. Despite inflation, the company also reported strong Marlboro sales, highlighting the resilience of its premium cigarette brands.

feed.title: A Look Into Corning Inc's Price Over Earnings
feed.summary: Corning Inc. (NYSE: GLW) stock is currently priced at $131.75, showing a slight decrease today but significant gains over the past month and year. The article examines Corning's Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 72.14, noting it's higher than the Electronic Equipment, Instruments & Components industry average of 51.8. This suggests the stock might be overvalued, although a high P/E could also indicate expected future growth.

feed.title: West Virginia AG says Apple enables sharing of child sex abuse materials
feed.summary: West Virginia's Attorney General, JB McCuskey, has filed a lawsuit against Apple, accusing the company of knowingly enabling the storage and distribution of child sex abuse materials on its iOS and iCloud servers. The lawsuit alleges that Apple has refused to implement industry-standard detection tools and that its internal communications indicated the company was aware of the issue. McCuskey is seeking for a court order for Apple to take reasonable measures to abate the materials, and also seeks restitution, disgorgement, and civil penalties.

feed.title: ClearBridge Appreciation ESG Strategy adds new stake in Arista Networks in Q4, exits Oracle
feed.summary: The ClearBridge Appreciation ESG Strategy initiated a new position in Arista Networks during the fourth quarter while divesting its stake in Oracle. The strategy also increased its holdings in companies like Salesforce and Microsoft, reflecting a focus on software-as-a-service growth and AI beneficiaries, respectively. Conversely, positions in Fiserv and Thermo Fisher Scientific were reduced.

feed.title: UAL Stock Heads to $100 as Oil Spike and United Airlines Rewards Shift Raise Concerns
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (UAL) shares dropped nearly 6% due to a surge in oil prices and changes to its MileagePlus loyalty program. Rising crude oil prices, driven by geopolitical tensions, increase fuel costs and pressure airline profit margins. The revamp of the rewards program, which favors cardholders, could alienate non-cardholding customers, adding further uncertainty for investors.

feed.title: Roper declares $0.91 dividend
feed.summary: Roper Technologies, Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.91 per share. This dividend is payable on April 22, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 8, 2026.

feed.title: Ted Sarandos Blames Netflix Stock Decline on WBD Bidding War, Industry Uncertainty and AI
feed.summary: Netflix co-CEO Ted Sarandos attributes the company's recent stock decline, amid its $83 billion pursuit of Warner Bros. Discovery assets, to the ongoing bidding war with Paramount, broader industry uncertainty, and the "AI trade." Despite concerns about stalling engagement growth, Sarandos defends Netflix's business model and the strategic importance of the WBD acquisition as an "accelerator" and a way to "future proof" its operations. He also dismissed claims about Paramount having a clearer path to regulatory approval, emphasizing that the process is a business deal handled by the Department of Justice, not a political one.

feed.title: Sagtec Global Limited Expands AI Ecosystem and Revenue Opportunities in Global Market
feed.summary: Sagtec Global Limited (SAGT) is expanding its AI SaaS ecosystem, moving towards a subscription-based model to generate predictable recurring revenue by serving over 12,000 businesses. The company is strategically expanding beyond Southeast Asia into larger markets like the U.S., targeting high-value contracts in sectors undergoing rapid AI transformation, supported by recent successes such as a $4 million Smart AI mobility platform deployment. CEO Ng Chen Lok highlights the goal of evolving Sagtec into a scalable AI SaaS revenue platform to capture long-term monetization opportunities.

feed.title: BridgeBio Pharma CAO Apuli sells $37898 in BBIO stock
feed.summary: BridgeBio Pharma's Chief Accounting Officer, Maricel Apuli, sold 510 shares of common stock for $37,898 and disposed of 4,349 shares to cover tax obligations. These transactions come as BridgeBio Pharma recently announced positive Phase 3 trial results for its achondroplasia treatment, infigratinib, leading to increased price targets from analysts and a $550 million convertible senior notes offering.

feed.title: EQT’s ‘Anti-Fragile Philosophy’ Won $130/Mcf-Plus During Fern
feed.summary: EQT Corp. leveraged its "anti-fragile philosophy" to achieve gas prices exceeding $130/Mcf during an event referred to as "Fern." This article, written by Nissa Darbonne, highlights a significant financial success for the natural gas company.

feed.title: ENPH Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Enphase Energy, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) for alleged securities fraud. Investors who purchased ENPH securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm before April 20, 2026. The lawsuit claims Enphase made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and the impact of the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit.

feed.title: West Virginia Sues Apple Over Alleged Child Sexual Abuse Content on iCloud
feed.summary: West Virginia is suing Apple, alleging that the company "knowingly allowed its iCloud platform to be used as a vehicle for distributing and storing child sexual abuse material" (CSAM). The lawsuit seeks to compel Apple to implement a system for tracking CSAM on iCloud, years after the company abandoned a similar system due to privacy concerns. The state argues that Apple's end-to-end encryption for iCloud provides a sanctuary for such illegal content, making it inaccessible to law enforcement.

feed.title: Halliburton’s Indonesian Geothermal Deal And What It May Mean For Valuation
feed.summary: Halliburton secured a multiyear contract with KS Orka Renewables to support geothermal well construction projects in Indonesia, expanding its presence in renewable energy services. This move diversifies Halliburton's revenue stream beyond traditional oilfield services and leverages its existing drilling expertise for low-carbon energy projects. The article highlights that while the stock trades below analyst targets and Simply Wall St's fair value estimate, investors should monitor the contribution of renewable projects to profits and Halliburton's debt levels.

feed.title: Edison International Wildfire Probe Raises Questions On Valuation And Risk
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is facing a criminal investigation by the Los Angeles County district attorney regarding its potential liability in the Eaton Fire, a fire that caused loss of life and property damage. The company is cooperating with authorities and has expanded its compensation program for wildfire victims. This probe raises concerns for investors about the company's legal exposure, risk controls related to wildfires, and the potential impact on its valuation, despite recent strong stock performance.

feed.title: Bandwidth reports Q4 revenue of $208 million, authorizes $80 million share repurchase
feed.summary: Bandwidth Inc. reported Q4 2025 revenue of $208 million and a net loss of $3 million, with full-year 2025 total revenue rising to $754 million and adjusted EBITDA increasing to $93 million. The company's board authorized an $80 million share repurchase program and provided a 2026 outlook of $864 million to $884 million in revenue and $1.66 to $1.74 Non-GAAP EPS.

feed.title: Fired Morgan Stanley Broker, Now With Connecticut RIA, Accepts Industry Bar
feed.summary: A 38-year veteran advisor, Gregory V. Matthews, who was fired by Morgan Stanley last year, has accepted an industry bar from FINRA. This action follows his refusal to cooperate with an investigation into allegations of exercising discretion without prior written authorization in customer accounts and concerns about trading frequency and order ticket accuracy. Matthews, who joined Connecticut-based RIA Procycon after his termination, will retain his investment advisor license as the FINRA bar does not affect it.

feed.title: CoStar cuts Richmond jobs as Homes.com faces scrutiny
feed.summary: CoStar Group has laid off an unspecified number of employees in its Richmond-area operations, marking the second round of cuts in a year, which coincides with the launch of Homes AI, a new voice-enabled AI guidance platform for Homes.com. These layoffs and the company's investment in Homes.com have drawn significant criticism from investors, including Third Point and The D. E. Shaw group, who allege misallocation of capital and underperformance impacting CoStar's stock price and shareholder returns. The company is also facing scrutiny after its CEO, Andy Florance, was not reconfirmed to the Virginia Commonwealth University Board of Visitors by the state Senate.

feed.title: VZ: Daiwa Capital Upgrades Verizon to 'Buy' with Raised Price Ta
feed.summary: Daiwa Capital has upgraded Verizon (VZ) from 'Outperform' to 'Buy', raising its price target by 20.83% from $48.00 to $58.00, signaling a positive outlook for the telecommunications company. This follows a trend of incremental positive adjustments by various analysts, although the average analyst recommendation for VZ is still "Hold" with an average target price of $49.84. GuruFocus estimates a downside of 11.9% from the current price, with an estimated fair value of $43.06.

feed.title: T-Mobile US (TMUS) Rating Upgraded by Daiwa Capital to Outperfor
feed.summary: Daiwa Capital has upgraded T-Mobile US (TMUS) from 'Neutral' to 'Outperform' and increased its price target to $240 from $230. This upgrade signals a positive outlook for T-Mobile within the telecommunications sector. Other analysts have also recently adjusted their ratings and price targets for TMUS, indicating varied but generally positive sentiment.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Inc – Q4 2025 Results Highlight Improved Revenue & Earnings
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) reported improved revenue and earnings for Q4 and the full year 2025, driven by growth in regulated electric utility operations and natural gas distribution. The company increased its 10-year capital investment plan to $65.5 billion, focusing on infrastructure upgrades, and reaffirmed its 2026 non-GAAP earnings guidance. CNP shares experienced a slight decline post-earnings, though institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. increased their stake.

feed.title: Brookdale Senior Living Misses Revenue Estimates in Latest Report
feed.summary: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. reported fourth-quarter revenue of $754.1 million, falling short of analyst expectations of $766.3 million, leading to a 9.21% drop in stock price. Despite the revenue miss and concerns about liquidity and high debt, the market reaction has been tempered, with investors showing cautious optimism regarding potential turnaround strategies. The company's high gross margin of 137.2% is noted as a potentially misleading anomaly given negative profit margins and return on assets.

feed.title: CBIZ Releases Q1 2026 Mid-Market Pulse Report: Business Leaders Prioritize Cost, Talent, and Tech Strategy
feed.summary: CBIZ, Inc. has released its Q1 2026 Mid-Market Pulse Report, revealing that middle-market business leaders are cautiously optimistic and focused on cost optimization, talent investment, and technology strategy. Key findings indicate that a significant majority prioritize cost efficiency, with many also concerned about talent acquisition and retention, technology modernization, and rising labor costs. In response, CBIZ has launched "Insights. Applied." to help organizations implement these strategies.

feed.title: Engineering giant Amentum to relocate global HQ to Reston
feed.summary: Engineering contractor Amentum is moving its global headquarters to Reston Station, signing a 45,000-square-foot lease. The company will join other major firms like Google and Rolls-Royce in the Reston location. This relocation signifies a notable move for the engineering giant to a prominent business hub.

feed.title: (WAVE) Price Dynamics and Execution-Aware Positioning
feed.summary: Eco Wave Power Global Ab (NASDAQ: WAVE) is showing weak sentiment, potentially signaling a resumption of long-term weakness after a neutral shift. No clear price positioning signal has been identified, and elevated downside risk remains due to a lack of additional long-term support signals. AI-generated trading strategies are provided for position trading (long), momentum breakout, and risk hedging (short), alongside multi-timeframe signal analysis.

feed.title: Are financial experts on Wall Street optimistic about the shares of Westinghouse Air Brake?
feed.summary: Wabtec (Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation) has demonstrated strong market performance, with its stock price significantly outpacing the S&P 500. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 results and completed the acquisition of Dellner Couplers. Analysts on Wall Street hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus for Wabtec, with an increasing number of "Strong Buy" ratings and positive price target revisions, indicating optimism for future growth.

feed.title: Roper Technologies announces dividend
feed.summary: Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) announced that its Board of Directors has approved a dividend of $0.91 per share. This dividend is payable on April 22, 2026, to stockholders of record on April 6, 2026. Roper Technologies operates market-leading businesses that design software and technology-enabled products.

feed.title: Vale Base Metals signs agreement to form a four‑partner consortium for Thompson
feed.summary: Vale Base Metals (VBM) has formed a new four-partner consortium for the Thompson nickel belt in Manitoba, including Exiro Minerals Corporation, Orion Resources Partners LP, and Canada Growth Fund Inc. The new company will see the partners hold an 81.1% stake, with VBM retaining 18.9%. The consortium plans to invest up to US$200 million for nickel mining in Thompson, and VBM has secured an offtake agreement for nickel concentrate, with the transaction expected to close by the end of 2026.

feed.title: Equinix: Strong Bookings Momentum And AI Tailwinds, But The Stock Is Overvalued
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) demonstrated strong FY'25 growth and increased its 2026 guidance, despite missing Q4 revenue and earnings expectations. The company is experiencing record bookings and interconnection revenue, driven by AI demand, with targets of 9-10% revenue and 9-11% AFFO growth for 2026. However, its valuation at 24-30x FFO is significantly higher than peers, leading to a "sell" rating due to limited near-term upside and increased risk.

feed.title: CSX Chief Executive Open to Deal as Rivals Pursue Mega Merger
feed.summary: CSX CEO Steve Angel is open to merger opportunities to create shareholder value, even as the company focuses on improving efficiency and performance. This comes amidst rival mega-merger proposals, such as the one between Union Pacific Corp. and Norfolk Southern Corp., which Angel views as both challenging and potentially opportunistic for CSX. Angel plans to achieve a "continuous improvement" culture within CSX, focusing on cost management and collaborating with staff and unions.

feed.title: Vistra Corp. (VST): Independent Power Leader And The 2026 AI Energy Demand | 2-Minute Analysis
feed.summary: This 2-Minute Analysis video dives into Vistra Corp. (VST), an independent power leader, examining its Quant rating (Hold), Seeking Alpha Analyst rating (Buy), and Wall Street rating (Strong Buy). Despite a strong profitability grade (A) and growth grade (A-), the stock receives an F for valuation and a D- for momentum, with its price performance largely flat over the last year. The analysis highlights Vistra's market capitalization of $58.11 billion and its position in the Utility sector, providing detailed factor grades for valuation, growth, profitability, momentum, and revisions.

feed.title: Amazon Fails to Stop Reinstated Teen Suicide Substance Claims
feed.summary: The Washington Supreme Court has reinstated negligence claims against Amazon Inc., ruling that families of teens who died by suicide after buying a toxic substance on its platform can sue. The court stated that suicide was not a superseding cause precluding claims under Washington's Product Liability Act, and Amazon had a duty of care in selling sodium nitrite. This decision follows a surge in suicides facilitated by sodium nitrite ingestion after 2018, leading to numerous lawsuits against the retailer.

feed.title: TERADYNE, INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Teradyne, Inc. has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing a year of strong financial growth, strategic acquisitions, and operational achievements, particularly in AI-driven semiconductor test. The company reported total revenues of $3,190.0 million, a 13.1% increase from 2024, and returned $778.4 million to shareholders. Teradyne outlined its future focus on AI-related demand, leveraging recent acquisitions, and managing identified challenges including customer concentration, currency fluctuations, and global competition.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean's CEO is using AI to predict how many hamburgers you'll eat—and to compete with Orlando, Vegas and Taylor Swift
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group's CEO, Jason Liberty, is using AI to transform its operations, moving beyond traditional cruising to compete with broader experience providers like Orlando, Vegas, and even Taylor Swift concerts. The company leverages AI for everything from predicting food production to personalizing customer experiences and managing 15 million price points daily, leading to a 15% stock increase and 2026 bookings already at two-thirds capacity. This tech-driven strategy aims to create a "lifetime of vacations" by catering to changing customer demographics and preferences for experiential spending.

feed.title: TD Cowen Raises Price Target on Rockwell Automation to $350 From $330, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for Rockwell Automation (ROK) shares to $350 from $330, while reiterating a "Hold" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the analyst firm. The article also provides a company profile for Rockwell Automation, detailing its product lines, services, and geographic sales distribution.

feed.title: Jefferies Cuts Price Target on United Airlines to $148 From $154, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has adjusted its price target for United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (UAL) to $148, down from the previous $154, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a re-evaluation by the firm's analysts. The article also provides a brief overview of United Airlines' business segments and recent news related to the company.

feed.title: Demystifying Verisk Analytics: Insights From 7 Analyst Reviews
feed.summary: Seven analysts have recently reviewed Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ: VRSK), resulting in an average price target of $228.86, an 11.29% decrease from the previous average. While the company demonstrates strong financial performance with high net margin, ROE, and ROA, it faces challenges with revenue growth compared to its sector and a higher-than-average debt-to-equity ratio. The reports provide detailed insights into individual analyst actions and key financial milestones.

feed.title: Assessing T-Mobile US: Insights From 10 Financial Analysts
feed.summary: Ten financial analysts have recently evaluated T-Mobile US (NASDAQ: TMUS), offering varied perspectives from bullish to indifferent, with an average price target of $243.2. This represents a 6.48% decrease from the previous average target. The article also delves into T-Mobile US's financial performance, highlighting its significant market capitalization, 8.9% revenue growth, strong net margin (12.36%), and high debt-to-equity ratio (1.99).

feed.title: Board of Directors of The Coca-Cola Company Elects New Officer and Approves 64th Consecutive Annual Dividend Increase
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company's Board of Directors announced its 64th consecutive annual dividend increase, raising the quarterly dividend by 4% from 51 cents to 53 cents per common share. The board also elected Todd Beiger as vice president and head of investor relations, effective March 31, succeeding Robin Halpern. This appointment recognizes Beiger's 25-year career with Coca-Cola, including his recent role as CFO for Costa Limited.

feed.title: Roper Technologies will pay investors $0.91 a share in April
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (Nasdaq: ROP) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.91 per share, approved by its Board of Directors. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on April 22, 2026, to all shareholders of record as of April 6, 2026. The company, a constituent of the Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, and Fortune 1000, has a history of compounding cash flow and shareholder value through market-leading technology businesses and strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: Coca-Cola has paid $101.9B in dividends since 2010—and is raising them again
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company's Board of Directors has approved its 64th consecutive annual dividend increase, raising the quarterly dividend by approximately 4% from 51 cents to 53 cents per common share. This brings the annual dividend to $2.12 per share. Since January 1, 2010, Coca-Cola has returned a total of $101.9 billion in dividends to its shareowners, with $8.8 billion paid in 2025 alone.

feed.title: Keysight Introduces Infiniium XR8 Oscilloscopes to Accelerate High-Speed Digital Validation and Compliance
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has launched its new Infiniium XR8 Real-Time oscilloscopes, designed to speed up high-speed digital and compliance testing and improve insights for modern electronics development. The XR8 features a new hardware and software architecture optimized for high-speed digital applications, integrating advanced ASIC technology for signal integrity and timing accuracy. This innovation aims to condense validation cycles from days to hours, addressing the challenges of evolving interface standards.
